final:
// // When EN is HIGH, select input A; when EN is LOW, select input B
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input EN,
    output reg Y
);always @ (A, B, EN) begin
    if (EN == 1'b0) begin
        Y = A;
    end else begin
        Y = B;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When EN is HIGH, select input A; when EN is LOW, select input B
